message:
test(fcp-core): pin CostEstimateConfidence documented ordering + CostEstimate shape (flywheel_connectors-xjuwz)

Bead asks for ConnectorChargingMode Display + ordering pinning. No type
literally named ConnectorChargingMode exists in fcp-core; the closest
charging-related enum is CostEstimateConfidence at protocol.rs:1074, the
3-variant confidence label attached to a connector's CostEstimate.
CostEstimate is the per-operation charging-mode payload; its confidence
label IS the charging-mode ordering signal.

Coverage: 3-variant snake_case serde matrix (Low/Medium/High),
documented-ordinal-mapping pinning (Low=0, Medium=1, High=2 — even
though Ord is NOT derived, the variant declaration order IS the
documented ladder, pinned via explicit ordinal helper so a future
shuffle of the enum body is caught loudly), CBOR Text-scalar shape,
PascalCase rejection, distinct-variant sentinel.

CostEstimate: 5-field full JSON shape with skip-when-None for every
optional field, default = empty `{}` shape (every field optional),
6 builder helpers (with_credits/with_duration_ms/with_bytes/and_credits/
and_duration_ms/and_bytes/and_currency/and_confidence), method-order
independence, JSON+CBOR roundtrip preserves all populated fields.
CurrencyCost 2-field shape + USD helper + JSON+CBOR roundtrip.
Distinct-confidence-levels-produce-distinct-JSON sentinel.

18 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-xjuwz cargo test -p
fcp-core --test connector_charging_mode_ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
